positive: A minimalistic, vibrant illustration of a stylized cosmic woodland scene. Features glowing, bioluminescent flora and fauna forming abstract silhouettes against a deep indigo and sapphire background. Dominant elements include crescent moon phases, stylized constellations forming geometric patterns, and elegant abstract leaf motifs that look like fractured glass. The style is modern vector art with a detailed linework, reminiscent of woodcut engravings but rendered in glowing neon colors. Excellent use of negative space and clean, strong outlines. Composition is highly symmetrical, centralized, and perfect for seamless apparel printing. High contrast, ethereal lighting, hyper-detailed, clean linework.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, low resolution, grainy, ugly, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, noise, jpeg artifacts
